name: Castlevania
description: Konami's gothic action franchise about the Belmonts, Dracula, and monster-filled castles.

eras.title: Classic Action Era
eras.description: Stage-based action games focused on deliberate platforming, whips, sub-weapons, and gothic horror.

eras.title: Igavania Era
eras.description: Exploration-focused action RPG period shaped by Symphony of the Night and the handheld entries.

eras.title: Modern Reinterpretation Era
eras.description: Lords of Shadow continuity and major 3D reboot attempts.
